summary: First iteration testing of SBC Manager (pt-BR). Backend: 22/22 pytest cases passed after fixing one bug (POST /api/users 500 error). Frontend: All 10 nav sections load, login/logout, dashboard metrics, Operadoras CRUD via UI, Rotas dropdowns populated, ACL/CDR/Live channels/FreeSWITCH XML+install script tabs, Users create/delete all working.

minor.issue: Returned 500 because MongoDB inserts mutate doc with ObjectId `_id` which was not excluded from response. FIXED in this iteration.
Pydantic EmailStr rejects reserved TLD `.local` (used in review spec as operator@sbc.local). Users must use real domains. Documented; not a code bug but affects the spec's example credential.

action_items: Consider using pydantic EmailStr with `validate_email` in test-tolerant mode, or document that `.local` emails are rejected in the UI hint under new user email field.
Cosmetic: seed CDR uses random.randint for src digits which may occasionally start with 0 - not a real issue.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/users had ObjectId leak into response (now fixed).
make_crud generic response returns `_id`-excluded via projection on GET, but on POST it pops `_id` explicitly which is fine.
server.py is 895 lines - could be split into routers per resource for maintainability, but acceptable for now.
CORS_ORIGINS env var is unused - code uses FRONTEND_URL directly.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (5 fails). Not required by review spec but flagged for future hardening.
test_credentials: admin@sbcmanager.com / Admin@2026 (verified working). NOTE: reserved TLDs like `.local` are rejected by pydantic EmailStr.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 3 operadoras, 2 ipbxs, 4 ACL, 3 rotas, 3 antifraud rules, 80 CDRs, and background simulator generates live_channels every 3-6s.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses httpOnly cookies (SameSite=None, Secure). Session-scoped auth fixture in backend_test.py handles cookies. Simulator populates live channels/CDR continuously. All 10 sidebar sections have data-testids `nav-<key>`. CRUD pages use CrudPage.jsx with `<prefix>-add-btn`, `<prefix>-form`, `<prefix>-field-<key>`, `<prefix>-form-save`. FreeSWITCH page has `fs-xml-content`, `fs-install-content`, `fs-tab-xml`, `fs-tab-install`.
